name: Mrs. Zahida Kousar
bio:
Mrs. Zahida Kousar is the visionary force behind Pebbles and Petals Pre-School, bringing a lifelong passion for early childhood education to Kishtwar. Her leadership is grounded in the belief that every child deserves a safe, joyful and stimulating start to their learning journey.

With years of dedication to community development and child welfare, she has championed the school's UK-based, play-based curriculum and its commitment to holistic development — shaping Pebbles and Petals into a trusted institution for families across the region.
